title: МinerSearch - Miner Detection and Removal

seo.description: Free utility for automatic detection and removal of hidden miners on Windows.

hero.title: МinerSearch - Miner Detection and Removal
hero.subtitle: Free utility for detecting and removing hidden cryptocurrency miners on Windows systems.

about.desc1: MinerSearch is a utility for detecting suspicious files, processes, services and other artifacts associated with hidden cryptocurrency miners.
about.desc2: The utility scans the system, suspends malicious processes, moves files to quarantine and generates detailed reports. Console mode and command-line parameters are supported.

f1.title: Process Scanning
f1.desc: Search for suspicious processes by signatures, ports and behavior

f2.title: Registry Check
f2.desc: Analysis of startup files, unwanted settings, and suspicious entries in the system registry.

f3.title: WMI and Services
f3.desc: Check WMI integrity and suspicious Windows services

f4.title: Task Scheduler
f4.desc: Analysis of the task scheduler and malware persistence mechanisms. Analysis in Windows Safe Mode is supported.

f5.title: Advanced Scanning Options
f5.desc: Wide range of launch parameters for precise scanning configuration

f6.title: Logging
f6.desc: Detailed reports on each scanning stage and found threats

usage.s1: Download the latest version from GitHub Releases and extract the archive into a separate folder.
usage.s2: Run application as administrator. On first launch, program offers to send scan results – this is optional.
usage.s3: Wait for scanning completion. After that, a form opens with brief report on eliminated threats.
usage.s4: Click "Open Report" to view detailed report or "Quarantine" to manage quarantine.

language-change: To change the language, create a file
language-in: in the program folder and specify

contact.title: Have questions?
contact.desc: Ask them in our Telegram chat — the team and community will answer quickly.

heroDonate.title: Support the Project
heroDonate.subtitle: If the utility was useful, you can support the development in any convenient way. This support helps continue the fight against miners and keeps development moving forward. Thank you!

boosty.desc: Visit the author's page on Boosty
